list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: Add solution for tree path sum and LCA problem
Implements: - LCA (Lowest Common Ancestor) finding using DFS - Tree path sum calculation using prefix sums - Helper functions for competitive programming input/output

change.afterPath: $PROJECT_DIR$/Codeforces/2025 ICPC Gran Premio de Mexico 2da Fecha/test.py

change.beforePath: $PROJECT_DIR$/HarbourSpace Basic of Algorithms 2025 BKK/Count Sort and Heap Sort/A.py
change.afterPath: $PROJECT_DIR$/HarbourSpace Basic of Algorithms 2025 BKK/Count Sort and Heap Sort/A.py

project.component: { "keyToString": { "AutoCp Solution.11504 - Dominos.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.11709.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.11770.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.A.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.Competitive_Programming.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.Dominos.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.F.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.L.executor": "Run", "CMake Application.N.executor": "Debug", "Python.11418 - Clever Naming Patterns.executor": "Run", "Python.12821 - Double Shortest Paths.executor": "Run", "Python.820 - Internet Bandwidth.executor": "Run", "Python.A (1).executor": "Run", "Python.A (2).executor": "Run", "Python.A (3).executor": "Run", "Python.A. Binary search in array.executor": "Run", "Python.A. Inserting numbers.executor": "Run", "Python.A.executor": "Run", "Python.AC - A - Frog 1.executor": "Run", "Python.AC - B - Frog 2.executor": "Run", "Python.B (1).executor": "Run", "Python.B (2).executor": "Run", "Python.B. Restaurants on the road.executor": "Run", "Python.B.executor": "Run", "Python.B2.executor": "Run", "Python.C (1).executor": "Run", "Python.C (2).executor": "Run", "Python.C Array and Operations.executor": "Run", "Python.C. Root of a polynomial.executor": "Run", "Python.C.executor": "Debug", "Python.C2.executor": "Run", "Python.CF - D. Distance in Tree.executor": "Run", "Python.D (1).executor": "Run", "Python.D. Choosing Capital for Treeland.executor": "Run", "Python.D. Maximal correct parenthesis substring.executor": "Run", "Python.D. Road Improvement.executor": "Run", "Python.D.executor": "Run", "Python.E. Expression Correction.executor": "Run", "Python.E.executor": "Run", "Python.F.executor": "Run", "Python.G.executor": "Run", "Python.H.executor": "Run", "Python.I.executor": "Debug", "Python.J (1).executor": "Run", "Python.J.executor": "Run", "Python.K.executor": "Run", "Python.L.executor": "Run", "Python.M (1).executor": "Run", "Python.M.executor": "Run", "Python.temp.executor": "Run", "Python.temp2.executor": "Run", "Python.temp3.executor": "Run", "Python.test.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.readMode.enableVisualFormatting": "true", "RunOnceActivity.west.config.association.type.startup.service": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "cf.first.check.clang-format": "false", "cidr.known.project.marker": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/paypa/OneDrive/Desktop/chatterbox", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "onboarding.tips.debug.path": "C:/Users/paypa/OneDrive/Desktop/Project/Competitive-Programming/main.cpp", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.pluginManager", "structure.view.defaults.are.configured": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" } }

task.summary:
feat: Add solution for tree path sum and LCA problem
Implements: - LCA (Lowest Common Ancestor) finding using DFS - Tree path sum calculation using prefix sums - Helper functions for competitive programming input/output

feat: Add solution for tree path sum and LCA problem

feat: Add solution for tree path sum and LCA problem
